column8: orig on-demand texture-page streaming scheduler (LRU-evict + DXD3DTexture::LoadRGB + retry); port loads all level textures upfront in td5_asset_load_track_texture_set per ARCH-DIVERGENCE note at td5_asset.c:3043-3050

orig returns per-page status byte (g_textureCacheRuntimeCount[3]+7+id*8) for D3D3 primitive-opcode rewrite in PrepareMeshResource; port td5_render.c has no readers of s_texture_cache[].status — D3D3 opcode-tag pass folded away per td5_track.c:5535-5547

port td5_render_advance_texture_ages mirrors orig LRU sweep — used→age=0+clear flag else age++ with 0xFF saturate; struct-array vs raw-byte traversal is semantic-preserving refactor (L5 confirmed at 2026-05-21)

port td5_render_reset_texture_cache mirrors orig dual-loop reset (status+age byte zero + page-id array zero); struct vs raw-byte reshape preserves semantics; port adds explicit current/previous-page=-1 invalidation done by orig in BeginRaceScene instead

orig DXD3D::GetMaxTextures(0x40)=64 cap stored in DAT_0048DC40+0x10 + g_appExref+0xDC + AGP-usage log; port abstracts via D3D11 wrapper with TEXTURE_CACHE_SLOTS=600 (td5_types.h:115) and logs at td5_render_init
